description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy, using the node:12 Docker image for both jobs. In the test stage add a test job that runs "yarn" then "yarn test". In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on tags, sets the variables PUBLIC_URL, REACT_APP_VERSION, SURGE_LOGIN and SURGE_TOKEN, then runs "yarn", "yarn build", copies build/index.html to build/200.html, and executes "node_modules/.bin/surge build genar-radio.surge.sh" to publish the site to Surge. Include the standard Code-Quality template. No caches or artifacts are defined.
